title: Drazinda Heat Wave
lead: Drazinda is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.49. This anomaly has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Drazinda has led to extremely high temperatures, with a CDD of 14.7 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 30%, and the wind speed is 5.9 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The HDD is at 0.0 GG, indicating no heating degree days, and the focus is on cooling.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave protocols immediately.
